Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Refactor sentence generation to show full translation instead of word-by-word tooltips

- Updated generate-sentence API to return both Spanish and German sentences
- Changed user flow: click once to reveal Spanish word and sentence, click again to show full German translation
- Added styled orange container for Spanish sentences and blue container for German translations
- Removed word-by-word translation feature (WordTooltip component and translate-word API)
- Added fade-in animation for sentence appearance (500ms delay)
- Next button now only appears after translation is revealed
- Fixed word spacing in sentences to show natural text flow

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(cd "/c/Users/svenb/Desktop/loruuh/02 Spanish Generator/CapturCherry" && python3 << 'EOF'
import json

with open\('data/vocabulario-es.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

# Count issues
no_article_nouns = []
empty_sentence_es = []
empty_sentence_de = []
empty_german = []
empty_spanish = []

for entry in data:
    entry_id = entry.get\('id'\)
    spanish = entry.get\('spanish', ''\)
    german = entry.get\('german', ''\)
    entry_type = entry.get\('type', ''\)
    sent_es = entry.get\('sentence_es', ''\)
    sent_de = entry.get\('sentence_de', ''\)
    
    if not spanish:
        empty_spanish.append\(entry_id\)
    if not german:
        empty_german.append\(entry_id\)
    if not sent_es:
        empty_sentence_es.append\(entry_id\)
    if not sent_de:
        empty_sentence_de.append\(entry_id\)
    
    # Check for nouns without articles
    if entry_type == 'noun':
        if not german.startswith\(\('der ', 'die ', 'das ', 'den ', 'dem ', 'des ', 'ein ', 'eine ', 'einem ', 'einen ', 'einer ', 'eines '\)\):
            no_article_nouns.append\(\(entry_id, spanish, german\)\)

print\(f"Total entries: {len\(data\)}"\)
print\(f"Nouns without articles: {len\(no_article_nouns\)}"\)
print\(f"Empty Spanish: {len\(empty_spanish\)}"\)
print\(f"Empty German: {len\(empty_german\)}"\)
print\(f"Empty sentence_es: {len\(empty_sentence_es\)}"\)
print\(f"Empty sentence_de: {len\(empty_sentence_de\)}"\)

print\("\\nFirst 30 noun entries without articles:"\)
for eid, spa, ger in no_article_nouns[:30]:
    print\(f"  ID {eid}: {spa} -> {ger}"\)
EOF)
